subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out. I'd be happy to discuss the collaboration opportunity between our teams.

Here are some proposed meeting slots:
• Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which of these works best for your team.

Regarding your request for internal contact information, I'm unable to provide direct contact details. Please refer to our public website for general contact information.

Best regards
